name: Shredded Beef and Vegetable Salad (Rr)
recipeIngredient: freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
1/4 pound snow peas, trimmed and sliced on bias
1 head butter lettuce, trimmed of outer leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. THIS IS A LEFT-OVER RECIPE FOR USE WITH THE DRUNKEN RUMP ROAST MASTER RECIPE.
2. Combine vinegar, garlic, salt, and pepper in a small bowl; let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Whisk in olive oil, then stir in parsley; let stand for 15 minutes.
4. Blanch carrots in a pot of lightly salted boiling water for 10 seconds; add snow peas and blanch for an additional 10 seconds.
5. Drain the vegetables and plunge into a bowl of ice water; let chill for 5 minutes, then drain.
6. Pat dry and transfer to a small bowl. Add red pepper and 2 tablespoons vinaigrette; toss well.
7. Add 2 tablespoons vinaigrette to the roast beef; toss well.
8. Separate lettuce leaves, toss with 2 tablespoons vinaigrette, and divide among 4 plates. Mound a portion of beef on each plate of lettuce. Top with vegetable mixture. Garnish with jalapeno.
Suggested Wine: An oak-y Chardonnay
